CustomField.formula:
CASE(RecordType.Name, 'Scotia Bank Insolvency Account', CASE(Insolvency__r.Insolvency_Type__c, 'Consumer Proposal', CASE(Account_Type__c, 'Bank Card Product', 0.1395, 'Scotia Plan Loan', 0.1421, 'Line of Credit', 0.1431, 'Overdraft - Retail', 0.0896, 'Overdraft - Small Business', 0.0896, 'Mortgage', 0.0896, 'STEP Mortgage', 0.0896, 'Auto Loan', 0.1184, 'Online Loans', 0.1421, 'Term Loan', 0.1421, 'Unknown', 0.0896, 0), 'Bankruptcy', CASE(Account_Type__c, 'Bank Card Product', 0.0177, 'Scotia Plan Loan', 0.0215, 'Line of Credit', 0.0250, 'Overdraft - Retail', 0.007, 'Overdraft - Small Business', 0.007, 'Mortgage', 0.007, 'STEP Mortgage', 0.007, 'Auto Loan', 0.0215, 'Online Loans', 0.0215, 'Term Loan', 0.0215, 'Unknown', 0.007, 0), 0), 'SPL Insolvency Account', CASE(Insolvency__r.Insolvency_Type__c, 'Consumer Proposal', CASE(Account_Type__c, 'Bank Card Product', 0.11, 0), 'Bankruptcy', CASE(Account_Type__c, 'Bank Card Product', 0.0115, 0), 0), 'SDA Insolvency Account', CASE(Insolvency__r.Insolvency_Type__c, 'Consumer Proposal', CASE(Account_Type__c, 'Auto Loan', 0.053, 0), 'Bankruptcy', CASE(Account_Type__c, 'Auto Loan', 0.0095, 0), 0), 'Fairstone Insolvency Account', CASE(Insolvency__r.Insolvency_Type__c, 'Bankruptcy', CASE(Account_Type__c, 'World Walmart Rewards Mastercard', 0.0177, 'Core Walmart Rewards Mastercard', 0.0177, 'Home Equity Secured Mastercard', 0.0177, 0), 'Consumer Proposal', CASE(Account_Type__c, 'World Walmart Rewards Mastercard', 0.13, 'Core Walmart Rewards Mastercard', 0.13, 'Home Equity Secured Mastercard', 00.13, 0), 'Division 1 Proposal', CASE(Account_Type__c, 'World Walmart Rewards Mastercard', 0.13, 'Core Walmart Rewards Mastercard', 0.13, 'Home Equity Secured Mastercard', 00.13, 0), 0),
Portfolio_Name_Lookup__r.Purchase_Price_Percent__c)
CustomField.label: Purchase Factor
